windows_intro: Option 1 — Windows Executable (recommended for most users). Start the detector quickly and easily on your Windows system.
windows_download_desc: Choose the correct file for your hardware in the latest release.
windows_hw_win10_rtx3000: Windows 10 with NVIDIA RTX 3000 series or newer
windows_hw_win10_rtx2000: Windows 10 with NVIDIA RTX 2000 series or older
windows_note_title: Not sure which one to choose?
windows_note_text: Start with the winml version on Windows. Only use a cuda build if you are certain that your NVIDIA setup matches that specific CUDA version.
windows_setup_step1: Create a folder, for example C:\aidetector, and move the downloaded .exe file to this folder.
